title: Auditing the sales_kpi Dataset
summary: Run focused checks for available categories, statuses, ranges, and missing values.

sketchBlocks.title: Introduction to the Capstone Project
sketchBlocks.bodyMarkdown: In this final capstone project, you will take on the role of a data analyst tasked with auditing the `sales_kpi` dataset. Your goal is to prepare a comprehensive executive sales performance report. This involves checking for available categories, statuses, ranges, and identifying any missing values. By the end of this project, you will have a polished SQL query that provides insights into sales performance, ready for presentation to stakeholders.

quizDraft.title: Check for Distinct Categories
quizDraft.prompt: Write a query to find all distinct categories in the `sales_reporting` table. This will help you understand the variety of products available.
quizDraft.hint: Use the lesson explanation and the wording of this question to narrow the answer.

help.concept: This support text was repaired because the original wording revealed the answer too directly.
help.hint_1: Compare the question to the lesson example and remove details that do not match the requested concept.
help.hint_2: Use the role or evidence named in the prompt instead of relying on answer wording.

quizDraft.title: Identify Missing Customer Ratings
quizDraft.prompt: Write a query to find all records in the `sales_reporting` table where the `customer_rating` is missing. This will help you identify incomplete data.
quizDraft.solutionCode: SELECT * FROM sales_reporting WHERE customer_rating IS NULL;
quizDraft.hint: Use the lesson explanation and the wording of this question to narrow the answer.

help.concept: This support text was repaired because the original wording revealed the answer too directly.
help.hint_1: Compare the question to the lesson example and remove details that do not match the requested concept.
help.hint_2: Use the role or evidence named in the prompt instead of relying on answer wording.

quizDraft.title: Calculate Total Sales per Region
quizDraft.prompt: Write a query to calculate the total sales for each region in the `sales_reporting` table. This will help you understand regional sales performance.
quizDraft.solutionCode: SELECT region, SUM(quantity * unit_price) AS total_sales FROM sales_reporting GROUP BY region;
quizDraft.hint: Use the lesson explanation and the wording of this question to narrow the answer.

quizDraft.title: Find Orders with High Discounts
quizDraft.prompt: Write a query to find all orders in the `sales_reporting` table where the discount percentage is greater than 10%. This will help you identify heavily discounted sales.
quizDraft.hint: Use the lesson explanation and the wording of this question to narrow the answer.

help.concept: This support text was repaired because the original wording revealed the answer too directly.
help.hint_1: Compare the question to the lesson example and remove details that do not match the requested concept.

quizDraft.title: Determine Average Customer Rating by Category
quizDraft.prompt: Write a query to determine the average customer rating for each product category in the `sales_reporting` table. This will help you assess customer satisfaction across categories.
quizDraft.solutionCode: SELECT category, AVG(customer_rating) AS avg_rating FROM sales_reporting GROUP BY category;
quizDraft.hint: Use the lesson explanation and the wording of this question to narrow the answer.
